LanguageData.AA_Bullet_TinyVenomBarb.description: Fire a shower of small but deadly venomous barbs that pierce skin and deliver a potent toxin, weakening targets over time.
LanguageData.AA_Bullet_TinyVenomBarb.label: tiny venomous barbs
LanguageData.AA_ExplodingWeb.description: Throw a web of sticky silk that can stun its target and explode violently.
LanguageData.AA_ExplodingWeb.label: exploding web
LanguageData.AA_HugeQuill.description: Launch a massive quill tipped with barbs that embeds deeply, causing severe pain and making removal agonizingly difficult.
LanguageData.AA_HugeQuill.label: huge quill
